description: Determines where a magical tradition gets its power from. Part of the Magical Tradition Focus system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines where a magical tradition gets its power from. Part of the Magical Tradition Focus system.

entries.result: The power is drawn from a specific cosmic entity or group of entities

resultTranslations.en: The power is drawn from a specific cosmic entity or group of entities

entries.result: The source is reality, and in some places in creation spells are more powerful because there is a greater concentration of magic there

resultTranslations.en: The source is reality, and in some places in creation spells are more powerful because there is a greater concentration of magic there

entries.result: The power comes from within the magical practitioner themself

resultTranslations.en: The power comes from within the magical practitioner themself

entries.result: The power is drawn from another dimension

resultTranslations.en: The power is drawn from another dimension

entries.result: The source is nature and the natural world

resultTranslations.en: The source is nature and the natural world

entries.result: The power comes from a single magical object

resultTranslations.en: The power comes from a single magical object

entries.result: The power comes from a single magical location

resultTranslations.en: The power comes from a single magical location

entries.result: The power is pulled from objects, like minerals, powders, and other substances

resultTranslations.en: The power is pulled from objects, like minerals, powders, and other substances

entries.result: The power is drawn from the energy of life and death itself

resultTranslations.en: The power is drawn from the energy of life and death itself

entries.result: The power is sourced from the hidden crevices and subtle cracks in the universe, exploiting them to change reality

resultTranslations.en: The power is sourced from the hidden crevices and subtle cracks in the universe, exploiting them to change reality

entries.result: Magic is a type of science, sourced from nature, explainable and manipulated through understanding and experimentation

resultTranslations.en: Magic is a type of science, sourced from nature, explainable and manipulated through understanding and experimentation

entries.result: There is no source, magic exists as a force of the universe

resultTranslations.en: There is no source, magic exists as a force of the universe

entries.description: Don't roll on the Meaning Tables or make an interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Don't roll on the Meaning Tables or make an interpretation

entries.result: Magic has a source, but it is unknown

resultTranslations.en: Magic has a source, but it is unknown

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning Tables and include them with the other words rolled to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning Tables and include them with the other words rolled to make your interpretation
